stories.headline: Box Office: ‘Supergirl’ Flies to $18 Million on Opening Day - Variety
stories.summary: 'Supergirl' made $18 million on opening day, but it wasn't enough to beat 'Toy Story 5' for the box office crown.

stories.headline: Prince Harry, Duchess Meghan to stay in royal residence during UK return - USA Today
stories.summary: Prince Harry and Meghan accepted an invitation from King Charles III to stay at a royal residence for their first UK visit as a couple in four years.

stories.headline: Taylor Swift’s unusual wedding gift rule ignites etiquette debate: 'Honor their wishes' - Fox News
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's reported no gifts wedding rule sparks debate on whether guests should bring nothing, give cash or make a charitable donation. Etiquette experts weigh in.

stories.summary: Oliver Tree‘s team wasted no time fulfilling his wishes following his sudden death earlier this month -- they've officially launched Dr. Oliver Tree's Extremely Epic Art Grant for Baby Geniuses found…

stories.summary: It’s a big show. Event times have been moving around, and now we’ve got one from Saudi Arabia. We’ve got you.

stories.headline: Kate Middleton and Prince George Coordinate for Rare Joint Outing - instyle.com
stories.summary: Kate Middleton and her son Prince George made a rare appearance on June 27 at a Royal Air Force base. The mother and son wore coordinated blazers for the outing.
